page.title: Season planner
page.subtitle: Plan your whole squad's peaks in one place. Form is earned in the lead-up, not handed out.

empty.title: Season planner isn't live yet
empty.description: This is where you'll plan each rider's form peaks across the season. Check back soon.

firstRun.title: Plan your first peak
firstRun.body: Every rider is riding flat right now. Target a race and the planner builds a lead-up that lifts their form for the day that matters. Each rider can peak for up to {max} races a season, so choose where it counts.
firstRun.cta: Pick a rider lane to start, or open a race to see who fits it.

assistant.bannerTitle: The assistant has drafted your form programs
assistant.bannerBody: Every rider below already has a suggested peak plan, built from their race calendar, type, and age. Accept it as-is, tweak individual peaks, or reset a rider to blank.
assistant.resetDone: Suggestion cleared. Pick a target race whenever you're ready.
assistant.reasonRegistered: Matches a race you've already entered them for.
assistant.reasonSuitability: Best type match on your calendar.

lane.noPeaks: No peaks set. A flat season until you plan one.

race.summary: {stages} stages · {summits, plural, =0 {no summit finishes} one {# summit finish} other {# summit finishes}}
race.rivalCount: {count, plural, =0 {No rivals peak here} one {# rival also peaks here} other {# rivals also peak here}}

rider.noPeak: No peak yet. Pick a target race to plan one.

error.max_reached: This rider already has the maximum of {max} peaks.
error.duplicate_target: This rider already peaks for that race.
error.locked: This peak is locked and can no longer be changed.
error.race_not_in_calendar: That race isn't in your division's calendar.
